arts.ttl: Torino vs Juventus for city supremacy
arts.sum: In 10 of their last 13 league games against Torino, Juventus have scored at least one goal from the 70th minute onwards; in general, 12 goals have been scored in this phase of the match by the Bianconeri against the Granata in the last seven seasons, a record for a Serie A team against a single opponent in this period (since 2018/19). Derby della Mole between Torino and Juventus: both will want to win to chase their respective goals

arts.ttl: Juventus Target Chelsea’s Disasi as Defensive Reinforcement
arts.sum: Juventus are actively pursuing a central defender as part of their January transfer strategy, with Chelsea's Axel Disasi emerging as a notable target. The club is looking to bolster its defence, particularly given the injuries to key players Bremer and Cabal, which necessitate at least one new signing in that position.
